name: Granny Smith Apple-Onion Soup with Celery Roo
recipeIngredient: 3 Granny Smith apples, peeled, cored and chopped
1 medium celery root, peeled and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté onions, potatoes, apples, and celery root in the oil.
2. When the onions are soft, add the chicken stock.
3. Bring to a boil, then lower to a simmer and cook for about 40 minutes, until all the vegetables are very soft.
4. Puree using a blender.
5. Return to pot and reheat.
6. Add salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve garnished with chopped chives if desired.
Serves 10
From the cookbook "Apples" by Robert Berkley
